The '''BlasTech E-11b blaster rifle''' was an expertly and expensively modified version of the standard issue [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], which were modeled after the [[DC-15]] series used in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. These weapons were often found in the hands of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] troops, namely those in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

The original [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] E-11 was powerful and light, and nigh innumerable due to its use by the Imperial forces. However, its inaccuracy and overheating were listed among the item's drawbacks. Modified by skilled BlasTech and [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] armorers who defected to the Rebel Alliance, the BlasTech E-11b's main changes were the addition of expensive cooling units,<ref name="EL" /> making these [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]] less likely to overheat at higher fire rates.

The basic E-11 and modified E-11b were 438mm long with the [[Stock/Legends|folding stock]] folded, though the E-11b was usually seen extended. Unmodified, the E-11 weighed 2.6 kilograms. The [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]] housing opened on the left side of the action housing, above the trigger, giving it a low profile. The original E-11's [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] gas cartridges allowed for over 500 shots, while the powercells lasted for about 100 shots, depending on setting.
